good_example.sv

Company: BTA Design Services

Author: vbes[xxx]yakov@btadesigns[xxx]ervices.com

Description: Example SystemVerilog file with correct NaturalDocs documentation This file demonstrates proper documentation for all constructs and passes all naturaldocs_lint.py checks.

Created: October 2, 2025

Preprocessor Defines
BTA_MAX_BURST_LEN
`define BTA_MAX_BURST_LEN 256

Maximum burst length supported by the DUT (decimal)

BTA_FIFO_DEPTH
`define BTA_FIFO_DEPTH 32'h0000_0040

Depth of the internal FIFO in entries (hex)

BTA_BASE_ADDR
`define BTA_BASE_ADDR 32'hDEAD_0000

Base address of the register block.  Aligned to a 4 KB boundary in the system memory map.

BTA_TIMEOUT_CYCLES
`define BTA_TIMEOUT_CYCLES 50000

Number of clock cycles before the watchdog fires.  Chosen to be long enough for the slowest expected transaction but short enough to catch real hangs during simulation.

BTA_LOG_INFO
`define BTA_LOG_INFO(
MSG
) \

Convenience macro for logging an info message with the component name.  Uses backslash continuation for a multi-line define (single statement).

BTA_CHECK_FIELD
`define BTA_CHECK_FIELD(
FIELD,
EXP
) \

Multi-line define that compares a transaction field and reports an error on mismatch. Demonstrates a multi-line macro with hex literal and begin/end block.

bta_example_pkg
package bta_example_pkg

Example package demonstrating correct NaturalDocs documentation.  This package contains properly documented classes, functions, tasks, and constraints that comply with BTA coding standards.

Type Definitions
state_t
typedef enum {
IDLE_t,
ACTIVE_t,
WAIT_t,
DONE_t
} state_t

State machine enumeration type for agent states

addr_t
typedef logic [31:0] addr_t

Address type for memory operations

data_t
typedef logic [63:0] data_t

Data type for transactions

ctrl_fields_t
typedef struct packed {
logic 
[3:0] 
burst_len;
logic 
[2:0] 
prot;
logic 
lock;
} ctrl_fields_t

Packed struct holding transaction control fields

data_overlay_t
typedef union packed {
logic 
[15:0] 
raw;
logic [1:0]
[7:0] 
bytes;
} data_overlay_t

Packed union allowing raw or byte-level access to a 16-bit value

Configuration Classes
bta_config_c
uvm_object
bta_config_c

Configuration class for the verification environment.  Contains all configuration parameters for the testbench components.

Configuration Parameters
NUM_LANES
parameter int NUM_LANES = 4

Number of data lanes supported by the DUT

DEFAULT_TIMEOUT
localparam int DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 5000

Default timeout value used when no override is provided

m_num_transactions
rand int m_num_transactions

Number of transactions to generate

m_timeout_cycles
rand int m_timeout_cycles

Timeout value in clock cycles

m_enable_coverage
bit m_enable_coverage

Enable functional coverage collection

m_verbosity
uvm_verbosity m_verbosity

UVM verbosity level for reporting

Constraints
num_transactions_c
constraint num_transactions_c

Constrains number of transactions to reasonable range

timeout_cycles_c
constraint timeout_cycles_c

Constrains timeout to prevent simulation hangs

Coverage
config_cg
covergroup config_cg

Covergroup that samples configuration parameter combinations

Methods
new
function new(
string 
name
 = 
"bta_config_c"
)

Constructor for configuration object

Parameters
name
string

Object name for UVM factory

do_print
virtual function void do_print(
uvm_printer 
printer
)

UVM print method override

Parameters
printer
uvm_printer

UVM printer object

sample_config
extern function void sample_config()

Trigger covergroup sampling after configuration is finalized

sample_config
function void bta_config_c::sample_config()

Out-of-class implementation of the extern prototype

Transaction Classes
bta_transaction_c
uvm_sequence_item
bta_transaction_c

Base transaction class for protocol transactions.  Contains address, data, and control fields.

Transaction Fields
m_addr
rand addr_t m_addr

Transaction address

m_data
rand data_t m_data

Transaction data payload

m_write
rand bit m_write

Write enable (1=write, 0=read)

m_valid
bit m_valid

Transaction valid signal

m_timestamp
time m_timestamp

Transaction timestamp in simulation time

Constraints
addr_range_c
constraint addr_range_c

Constrains address to valid memory range

data_non_zero_c
constraint data_non_zero_c

Constrains data to non-zero for testing

Methods
new
function new(
string 
name
 = 
"bta_transaction_c"
)

Constructor for transaction object

Parameters
name
string

Object name for UVM factory

do_copy
virtual function void do_copy(
uvm_object 
rhs
)

UVM copy method override

Parameters
rhs
uvm_object

Right-hand side object to copy from

do_compare
virtual function bit do_compare(
uvm_object 
rhs,
uvm_comparer 
comparer
)

UVM compare method override

Parameters
rhs
uvm_object

Right-hand side object to compare with

comparer
uvm_comparer

UVM comparer object

Returns

1 if objects match, 0 otherwise

convert2string
virtual function string convert2string()

Convert transaction to string for printing

Returns

String representation of transaction

Sequence Classes
bta_sequence_c
uvm_sequence #(bta_transaction_c)
bta_sequence_c

Base sequence class for generating transactions.  Generates a configurable number of random transactions.

Sequence Parameters
m_num_items
rand int m_num_items

Number of transactions to generate

Constraints
num_items_range_c
constraint num_items_range_c

Constrains sequence length to reasonable range

Methods
new
function new(
string 
name
 = 
"bta_sequence_c"
)

Constructor for sequence object

Parameters
name
string

Object name for UVM factory

body
virtual task body()

Main sequence body that generates transactions.  Creates and randomizes the specified number of transactions.

Driver Classes
bta_driver_c
uvm_driver #(bta_transaction_c)
bta_driver_c

Driver component that converts transactions to pin wiggles.  Implements the UVM driver interface for the protocol.

Configuration
m_config
bta_config_c m_config

Configuration object reference

Internal State
m_current_state
state_t m_current_state

Current state of the driver FSM

m_cycle_count
int m_cycle_count

Cycle counter for timing

Methods
new
function new(
string 
name
 = 
"bta_driver_c",
uvm_component 
parent
 = 
null
)

Constructor for driver component

Parameters
name
string

Component name

parent
uvm_component

Parent component

build_phase
virtual function void build_phase(
uvm_phase 
phase
)
UVM build phase

get configuration

Parameters
phase
uvm_phase

UVM phase object

run_phase
virtual task run_phase(
uvm_phase 
phase
)
UVM run phase

main driver execution

Parameters
phase
uvm_phase

UVM phase object

drive_transaction
virtual task drive_transaction(
bta_transaction_c 
trans
)

Drive a single transaction on the interface

Parameters
trans
bta_transaction_c

Transaction to drive

reset_driver
extern task reset_driver()

Reset the driver state machine and cycle counter to initial values

reset_driver
task bta_driver_c::reset_driver()

Out-of-class implementation of the extern task prototype

Monitor Classes
bta_monitor_c
uvm_monitor
bta_monitor_c

Monitor component that observes pin activity and creates transactions.  Implements protocol monitoring and coverage collection.

Analysis Ports
m_analysis_port
uvm_analysis_port #(
bta_transaction_c
) m_analysis_port

Analysis port for broadcasting observed transactions

Configuration
m_config
bta_config_c m_config

Configuration object reference

Statistics
m_transaction_count
int m_transaction_count

Total number of transactions observed

Methods
new
function new(
string 
name
 = 
"bta_monitor_c",
uvm_component 
parent
 = 
null
)

Constructor for monitor component

Parameters
name
string

Component name

parent
uvm_component

Parent component

build_phase
virtual function void build_phase(
uvm_phase 
phase
)
UVM build phase

create analysis port

Parameters
phase
uvm_phase

UVM phase object

run_phase
virtual task run_phase(
uvm_phase 
phase
)
UVM run phase

main monitor execution

Parameters
phase
uvm_phase

UVM phase object

collect_transaction
virtual task collect_transaction(
bta_transaction_c 
trans
)

Collect a transaction from the interface

Parameters
trans
bta_transaction_c

Transaction object to fill with observed data

report_phase
virtual function void report_phase(
uvm_phase 
phase
)
UVM report phase

print statistics

Parameters
phase
uvm_phase

UVM phase object

bta_bus_if
interface
bta_bus_if (input logic clk, input logic rst_n)

Simple bus interface used by the driver and monitor to communicate with the DUT. Contains clock, reset, address, data, and control signals.

Variables
addr
logic [31:0] addr

Address bus for memory-mapped transactions

data
logic [63:0] data

Bidirectional data bus

wr_en
logic wr_en

Write enable signal (1 = write, 0 = read)

valid
logic valid

Transaction valid handshake signal

ready
logic ready

Slave ready handshake signal

bta_top_wrapper
module bta_top_wrapper

Top-level wrapper module that instantiates the bus interface and connects the DUT to the verification environment.

Variables
clk
logic clk

System clock generated by the testbench

rst_n
logic rst_n

Active-low reset signal

bus_if
bta_bus_if bus_if (
.
clk(clk),
.
rst_n(rst_n)
)

Bus interface instance connecting DUT to the verification environment
